title: crotalaria misella
intro: Crotalaria misella, also known as the sticky calotrope or stick calotrope, is a plant species native to tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Crotalaria misella include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and providing relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
